[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] '''Vistore''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|Officer]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Colonel Vistore commanded [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B Frigate]] ''[[Fogger]]'', and was part of a task force responsible for a [[Aftermath of Hoth|campaign]] to eliminate [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] fleeing from [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].

{{Char-stub}}
